---
title: "New NPR data available (2008-2026)"
format: html
date: 06/19/2026
date-format: full
---

Updated NPR data are now available, with follow-up from 2008-2026. 

The new files are accessed by default when using `phenotools 0.5.0` to curate datasets; raw files available in data/durable/data/NPR/processed.

The data dictionary is updated, and the NPR tab shows available codes and lifetime diagnosis counts (i.e., any within the available follow-up).
